overview: This 12-week bulking program is designed for an advanced lifter with a focus on maximizing muscle hypertrophy. The program follows a Push/Pull/Legs split with 6 training days per week, emphasizing high volume and intensity. The periodization includes Accumulation, Intensification, Peak, and Deload phases to optimize muscle growth and recovery.
progression_rules: Utilize RPE/RIR for autoregulation. Aim for RPE 7-9.5, with progression through double progression method: hit the top of the rep range for all sets before increasing weight. Include intensity techniques like drop sets and rest-pause on isolation exercises.

days.notes: Focus on maintaining form as fatigue sets in.

days.notes: Ensure full range of motion on all pulling movements.

days.notes: Focus on controlled movements and full range of motion.
